summary: First complete testing of Tourism Cluster Jalisco website. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend mostly working with one critical ReactQuill compatibility issue in admin panel.

ui_bugs.issue: react_dom_1.default.findDOMNode is not a function - ReactQuill version compatibility issue with React 19
ui_bugs.details: ReactQuill 2.0.0 is not compatible with React 19. Needs upgrade or replacement with compatible rich text editor.

passed_tests: Companies listing with search and filtering
Company detail pages with WhatsApp integration
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix ReactQuill compatibility issue with React 19 in admin dashboard. Options: 1) Upgrade ReactQuill to latest version compatible with React 19, 2) Replace with alternative rich text editor like @uiw/react-md-editor or react-markdown-editor-lite, 3) Downgrade React to 18.x if necessary for compatibility.
